# proxmox_backup_server_user (Resource)

Manages a Proxmox Backup Server user via `/access/users`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "proxmox_backup_server_user" "example" {
  userid = "homepage@pbs"
  enable = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `userid` (String) Proxmox Backup Server user ID, for example `homepage@pbs`.

### Optional

- `comment` (String) User comment.
- `enable` (Boolean) Whether the user is enabled.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import proxmox_backup_server_user.example homepage@pbs
```
